overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a sunny beach, passing concrete structures and tents, then entering and walking on the ocean water surface. The scene features a coastal city backdrop with tall apartment buildings and clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with concrete bunkers and camping tents

events.description: character turns from facing camera and begins walking along the beach

agents.ego_description: character walks along the beach passing angular concrete structures and rows of blue and beige tents

entered.detail: angular gray concrete structures scattered across the sand
rows of blue and beige camping tents
tall modern glass and concrete residential towers lining the coastline
calm turquoise sea stretching to the horizon
dense green palm trees and vegetation behind the beach

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a sunny beach with the ocean to the left and city buildings to the right. After a brief pause, they turn and walk along the shore, passing concrete bunkers and camping tents while the camera follows from behind.

events.description: character turns right toward the ocean, leaving the tent area behind
character steps from dry sand into the shallow ocean water

agents.ego_description: character walks toward the ocean and enters the shallow water at the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the beach structures and walks toward the ocean. The concrete bunkers and tents fall behind as the character approaches the water's edge and steps into the shallow turquoise sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean surface with distant shoreline

events.description: character begins walking on top of the water surface instead of swimming
character stops walking and stands still on the water surface
character turns around to face the shore while standing on water

agents.ego_description: character walks on top of the water surface away from shore, stops to look around, then turns and walks back toward the beach

segments.scene_description: The character walks on top of the ocean water, moving away from the beach into the open sea. After reaching a distance, they stop, turn around to look back at the shore, and begin walking back toward the coastal buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny coastal shoreline into the open ocean before returning toward the city. It begins with the character walking along the beach, passing concrete bunkers and camping tents with the city skyline rising to the right. As the character turns away from these structures, the camera follows them toward the water's edge and into the shallow turquoise sea. The scene then shifts as the character walks directly on the surface of the ocean, moving further away from the land into the open water. Finally, the character stops and turns around to face the shore, beginning the walk back toward the distant coastal buildings.
